UFC 326 Recap | UFC Vegas 114 Preview

-Between Charles Oliveira / Max Holloway & Raul Rosas Jr / Rob Font, UFC fans watched (probably) 40 consecutive minutes of grappling control time. Not the most entertaining card, but I can appreciate greatness in any discipline.

-I think Sean Strickland vs Caio Borralho is the fight to make. Robbing Nassourdine Imavov of a title shot at this point would be asinine.

-Weird movement on the Michael Johnson line as the fight approached. Even weirder tweet about his nephew being kidnapped in St. Louis…either way, Drew Dober comes away w/ a great KO.

-I had the wrong read, but the correct bet, on Cody Garbrandt. Last minute I took him +3.5 as opposed to ML. He hit the +3.5 even without the two point deduction. Regardless, he did not look impressive. I’m not sure where you go with him at this point.

-Kevin Vallejos w/ his first Main Event this weekend. Rightfully earned. Looking forward to his fight vs Josh Emmett and the matchup between Chris Curtis & Myktybek Orolbai.

#UFC326 #UFCVegas114

Azamat says he expects Costa to be big enough for the move up to LHW and only hopes Paulo makes it to the fight bringing up Costa’s history of cancelled fights. Azamat also says that Brazilian fans are flooding his DMs showing their support to the Russian over the Brazilian Costa.

I asked Azamat about Paulo’s secret juice in which he responded by telling me it won’t help Costa and that the Russian secret juice is just hard work and dedication.

Azamat says the ultimate goal is to fight for the belt and hopes to make a big enough statement over Costa to get the next LHW title shot. His dream title fight was Alex Pereira which now seems unlikely with Pereira moving up to HW.

Azamat goes on to say he is confused why Jiri Procházka is fighting Carlos Ulberg for the belt. Before being booked against Costa, Azamat was calling for the Jiri fight but was told that Jiri was moving down to 185lb only for him to then get a 205lb title shot instead.
